description: You are a freelance journalist writing a feature article about the Tor network. Document your research by saving the official Tor Project community, metrics, and blog pages (https://community.torproject.org/, https://metrics.torproject.org/, and https://blog.torproject.org/) as HTML files named tor-community.html, tor-metrics.html, and tor-blog.html in the directory /home/ga/Documents/TorResearch/. Create a research bibliography at /home/ga/Documents/TorResearch/bibliography.txt containing the header "Research Bibliography - Tor Network Article" and a list of the three visited URLs, each accompanied by a brief one-line description.
